info.name: Phyo Server API
info.description: Complete API collection for Phyo Server TypeScript Backend with One-on-One Chat System. Features include real-time messaging, file uploads, online status tracking, typing indicators, and message read receipts.

request.description: Register a new user account (sends OTP to email for verification)

item.name: Campaigns

formdata.description: Product image files (required) - can upload multiple files

formdata.value: We're looking for fashion influencers to showcase our summer collection with authentic styling and engaging content. The campaign will focus on highlighting the versatility and comfort of our summer pieces through creative storytelling and lifestyle content.

request.description: Create a new campaign with product image upload support. Upload product image files and provide all campaign details. Required fields: productImages, campaignName, campaignType, campaignBrief, deliverables, compensation, budget, timelines, targetInfluencer. Optional fields: numberOfLivePosts, reels, status (defaults to 'Draft').

query.description: Search in campaign name, brief, or type

request.description: Get all campaigns with optional filtering and pagination
Get detailed information about a specific campaign
Get campaigns created by the authenticated brand user

formdata.description: New product image files (optional) - can upload multiple files

request.description: Update campaign details with optional product image upload (only for campaign owner and non-completed campaigns)
Delete a campaign (restrictions apply for active campaigns with applicants)
Apply to a campaign as an influencer
Select an influencer who has applied to the campaign (for brand owners)

formdata.description: Product image files (required) - can upload multiple files

formdata.value: Launch our new winter collection with authentic content showcasing cozy sweaters and jackets. We want influencers to create engaging content that highlights the warmth, style, and versatility of our winter pieces.
["1 Instagram Post with styling", "3 Instagram Stories", "1 Reel"]
{"type":"Barter/Gifting","giftValue":300,"products":["Winter Sweater","Wool Jacket"],"description":"Free products worth $300 plus future collaboration potential"}

request.description: Example of creating a campaign with Barter/Gifting compensation type and product image upload support. Shows how to structure compensation for product gifting campaigns.

formdata.description: Product image files (required) - can upload multiple files

formdata.value: Promote our latest tech gadget with authentic reviews and demonstrations. We're looking for tech influencers who can create compelling content that showcases the product's features and benefits to their audience.
["1 Review Post", "1 Unboxing Reel", "Product Demo Stories"]
{"type":"Affiliate/Commission","commissionRate":15,"description":"15% commission on all sales generated through your unique link"}

request.description: Example of creating a campaign with Affiliate/Commission compensation type and product image upload support. Shows how to structure compensation for affiliate marketing campaigns with commission rates.

item.description: Campaign management endpoints for creating, managing, and tracking influencer marketing campaigns

Get detailed influencer information including analytics
Debug endpoint to check database content, categories, cities, and sample data
Fetch Instagram reel data from Bright Data using the reel URL
Create a new influencer profile
Update influencer analytics and profile data
Check if the server is running

item.name: Payment & Subscription Management

request.description: Get all available subscription plans (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Premium) with their features and pricing
Get current user's subscription plan information including credits, status, and features
Get detailed credit information including remaining credits, usage, and reset dates
Create Razorpay payment order for Silver Plan ($19/month, 50 credits). Returns order details and Razorpay key for frontend integration.
Create Razorpay payment order for Gold Plan ($79/month, 250 credits) with role-based access and advanced features.
Create Razorpay payment order for Premium Plan ($199/month, unlimited credits) with all features unlocked.
Verify payment after successful Razorpay checkout. Use actual payment details from Razorpay dashboard for testing.
Get user's payment history with pagination
Cancel user's active subscription. Subscription will remain active until end date.
Run npm script to see sample Razorpay webhook payloads. This helps understand the webhook structure for testing.

item.description: Complete payment and subscription management with Razorpay integration. Includes plan management, payment processing, credit tracking, and subscription lifecycle.
